attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.EXT_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ENCRYPTED, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.CREATED_BY, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.CREATION_DATE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.LAST_UPDATED_BY, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.COUNTRY_CODE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.BRANCH_ID, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.BANK_ID, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM, 
replace(replace(replace( MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM_HASH1,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),' ') BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM_HASH1, 
replace(replace(replace( emf_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACCOUNTS.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM_HASH2,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,
chr(234),' ') BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM_HASH2, 
MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.MASKED_BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM, 
MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.BA_MASK_SETTING, 
MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.BA_UNMASK_LENGTH, 
MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.CURRENCY_CODE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.IBAN, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.IBAN_HASH1, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.IBAN_HASH2, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.SALT_VERSION, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.MASKED_IBAN, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.CHECK_DIGITS, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ACCOUNT_CLASSIFICATION, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ACCOUNT_SUFFIX, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.AGENCY_LOCATION_CODE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.PAYMENT_FACTOR_FLAG, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.FOREIGN_PAYMENT_USE_FLAG, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.EXCHANGE_RATE_AGREEMENT_NUM, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.EXCHANGE_RATE_AGREEMENT_TYPE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.EXCHANGE_RATE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.HEDGING_CONTRACT_REFERENCE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.SECONDARY_ACCOUNT_REFERENCE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.BA_NUM_SEC_SEGMENT_ID, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.IBAN_SEC_SEGMENT_ID, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE1, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE2, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE3, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE4, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE5, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE6, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE7, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE8, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE9, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE10, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE11, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE12, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE13, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE14, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.ATTRIBUTE15, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.REQUEST_ID, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.PROGRAM_ID, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.START_DATE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.END_DATE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME_ALT, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.SHORT_ACCT_NAME, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.DESCRIPTION, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM_ELECTRONIC, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.BA_NUM_ELEC_SEC_SEGMENT_ID, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.GES_UPDATE_DATE, MF_IBY_EXT_BANK_ACC.GLOBAL_NAME 
FROM

 WHERE

>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
